message:
fix: Resolve overlay hotkey conflicts between analysis panels

Multiple analysis overlay panels were registered with conflicting Alt+key
keyboard shortcuts, causing unpredictable behavior when users pressed
these hotkeys.

Conflicts identified and resolved:

1. Alt+A conflict:
   - AMGPathwayOverlay (Auxiliary Metabolic Genes) - KEPT as Alt+A
   - AnomalyOverlay (k-mer anomaly detection) - CHANGED to Alt+Y (anomalY)

2. Alt+D conflict:
   - ProteinDomainOverlay (InterPro/Pfam domains) - KEPT as Alt+D
   - DotPlotOverlay (self-similarity analysis) - CHANGED to Alt+O (dOt plot)

3. Alt+R conflict (fixed in previous commit):
   - StructureConstraintOverlay (RNA structures) - KEPT as Alt+R
   - DefenseArmsRaceOverlay (anti-defense systems) - CHANGED to Alt+E (dEfense)

Each overlay's icon badge and hotkey display prop were updated to match
the new key bindings, ensuring UI consistency.

Files changed:
- DotPlotOverlay.tsx: Alt+D → Alt+O, icon D → O
- AnomalyOverlay.tsx: Alt+A → Alt+Y

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,8 +72,9 @@ export function AnomalyOverlay({
     []
   );
 
+  // Hotkey Alt+Y for anomalY (Alt+A used by AMGPathwayOverlay)
   useHotkey(
-    { key: 'a', modifiers: { alt: true } },
+    { key: 'y', modifiers: { alt: true } },
     'Anomaly overlay',
     () => toggle('anomaly'),
     { modes: ['NORMAL'], category: 'Analysis' }
@@ -247,7 +248,7 @@ export function AnomalyOverlay({
       id="anomaly"
       title="ANOMALY DETECTION"
       icon="⚠️"
-      hotkey="Alt+A"
+      hotkey="Alt+Y"
       size="xl"
     >
       <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '1rem' }}>
